title: Workshop: Build a Neighborhood Animal-Support Hub
summary: Workshop: Build a Neighborhood Animal-Support Hub uses an original animal-support hub build scenario to retrieve earlier HTML skills, add a bounded artifact layer, and verify transfer with source and browser evidence.
objectives: Retrieve html document boilerplate, html elements nesting, html attributes, html text headings lists, html links urls, html images alt, html svg without step-by-step imitation.
Produce and verify a real animal-support hub build artifact or evidence report.
Preserve earlier valid requirements while diagnosing changed content and constraints.

starterFiles.html: <!-- Build the public information artifact here. -->
